form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months 3rd of 10 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, slow going 0.5 len behind Ingqwele with 56.5kg at $13.50. Previously second-up won by a nose at Fairview All Weather July 14 over 1600m defeating Royal City Girl carrying 55kg at $6. Strong winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up. First-up after two months 3rd of 10 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, slow going 0.5 len behind Ingqwele with 56.5kg at $13.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride and faltered badly at the 100m.
Shortly after the start, jumped outwards, squeezing Anotherdanceforme.
Pulling hard and shifted outwards slightly at the 1200m, bumping Queen Of Jazz.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 13 at Fairview All Weather on March 27 over 1600m, 5 len behind Kleinzee carrying 60kg at $15. The race before that 3rd of 12 at Fairview All Weather on March 10 over 1600m, 0.6 len behind Donny's Boy carrying 62kg at $9. Racing well and is nicely placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, came together and bumped James Fitzjames.
Hanging in from the 300m.
Shifted both ways away from the crop from the 300m.

form.formComment: Most recently won by 1.3 len at this track March 13 over 1800m defeating Wishes And Dreams with 58kg at $15. The race before that second last in a small field at this track in LR on February 27 over 1600m, slow going 10 len behind Anotherdanceforme carrying 60kg at $101. Impressed last start and can go on with it.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.0 len behind Ingqwele carrying 55kg at $9. The start before that 5th of 8 at Fairview All Weather on January 23 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Tripping Thunder carrying 56.5kg at $3.50. Another bold run is expected.

The start before that 6th of 11 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Ingqwele with 59.5kg at $9. A top-three finish would surprise.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up second last of 12 at Fairview All Weather on March 10 over 1600m, 9 len behind Donny's Boy with 61.5kg at $21. Second run from a spell 6th of 9 at this track on March 20 over 1800m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Heemstede carrying 49.5kg at $67. Others offer greater appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride.
Lost 1 length.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 12 at Fairview All Weather on March 10 over 1600m, 1.2 len behind Donny's Boy carrying 60kg at $21. The race before that won by 1.3 len at Fairview All Weather February 13 over 1600m defeating Mystic Vision carrying 60kg at $7. Genuine hope on latest effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover on the turn and into the straight.
Raced wide on the turn and into the straight.
Leaving the 800m, rolled out and immediately straightened.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 9 at this track on March 20 over 1800m, slow going 7 len behind Heemstede with 50kg at $41. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at this track July 11 over 1600m defeating Action America carrying 60kg at $21. Unlikely to threaten.
